texto: It does no service to the cause of racial equality for white people to content themselves with judging themselves to be nonracist. Few people outside the clan or skinhead movements own up to all-out racism these days. White people must take the extra step. They must become anti-racist.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clarence Page sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It does no service to the cause of racial equality for white people to content themselves with ju…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, political, people, útil em momentos de reflexao.

frase_original: It does no service to the cause of racial equality for white people to content themselves with judging themselves to be nonracist. Few people outside the clan or skinhead movements own up to all-out racism these days. White people must take the extra step. They must become anti-racist.
